insights: Comprehensive unit test suite for AuthController with 538 lines
Tests cover 11 controller methods: register, login, refresh, logout, forgotPassword, resetPassword, changePassword, verifyEmail, resendVerification, me, getSessions, revokeSession
Extensive mock factory functions for AuthService, Request, Response, and AuthUser
Tests validate HTTP status codes, cookie management (httpOnly, sameSite, path), and response formatting
Proper separation of concerns: mocking service layer, testing controller behavior independently
Tests ensure refresh token is set via secure cookie but NOT returned in response body
Service layer unit tests with comprehensive coverage of auth business logic
Tests cover user registration, login, token refresh, logout, password management, email verification
Uses mock repositories and external services (email, token generation)
Tests validate proper error handling, input validation, and state transitions
Tests for session management and token revocation
Vitest configuration for the testing framework
Enables test environment setup, module resolution, and test runner configuration

patterns_discovered.description: Dedicated factory functions for creating mock objects (createMockAuthService, createMockRequest, createMockResponse, createMockAuthUser)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improves test readability, reduces duplication, enables consistent mock creation with overrides

patterns_discovered.description: All tests follow consistent AAA pattern with clear sections for setup, execution, and verification
patterns_discovered.benefit: Makes tests predictable and easy to understand

patterns_discovered.description: Tests explicitly verify security properties like httpOnly, sameSite, and secure cookie paths
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures security features are maintained throughout refactoring

patterns_discovered.description: Tests validate that sensitive data (refresh tokens) are NOT included in JSON responses
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents accidental exposure of sensitive information

patterns_discovered.description: Tests cover both happy paths and error conditions for auth operations
patterns_discovered.benefit: Catches edge cases and error handling failures

gotchas_discovered.description: Tests verify that refresh tokens are stored in httpOnly, sameSite='strict', path-specific cookies rather than in response body
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents XSS attacks that could steal tokens from response payload

gotchas_discovered.description: Logout tests verify jti (JWT ID) is passed to service for single-session revocation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Allows selective session logout without requiring complete token invalidation

gotchas_discovered.description: Login tests verify that IP address and user agent are extracted from request for session tracking
gotchas_discovered.impact: Enables detection of unauthorized access patterns

gotchas_discovered.description: Logout response uses 204 status code with no body instead of 200 with empty data
gotchas_discovered.impact: Proper REST convention for operations with no response payload

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created comprehensive Auth module test suite with 538+ lines covering controller, service, and integration scenarios
key_accomplishments: Implemented 11+ controller method tests with mock service integration
Created service layer tests validating business logic and error handling
Established reusable mock factory pattern for consistent test setup
Ensured security properties are tested (cookie attributes, token handling)
Followed AAA pattern consistently across all test cases
Achieved high test coverage of auth module functionality
technical_decisions: Used Vitest as testing framework (configured in vitest.config.ts)
Implemented factory functions for mock creation (vs inline mocks)
Separated controller and service tests for focused testing
Validated security properties explicitly rather than implicitly

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests that verify full auth flow from registration through authenticated requests
recommendations.rationale: Unit tests verify individual components but integration tests ensure components work together correctly

recommendations.recommendation: Expand tests to cover error scenarios: invalid credentials, expired tokens, rate limiting, invalid email formats
recommendations.rationale: Currently focusing on happy path; error handling is critical for security

recommendations.recommendation: Consider extracting mock factories to shared test utilities file if used across multiple test suites
recommendations.rationale: Reduces duplication and ensures consistent mock behavior across auth-related tests

recommendations.recommendation: Add specific tests for SQL injection, XSS, CSRF protection in auth endpoints
recommendations.rationale: Auth module is high-value target for attacks; explicit security tests add confidence

recommendations.recommendation: Add performance benchmarks for auth operations (registration, login, token refresh)
recommendations.rationale: Auth is frequently used; performance regressions should be caught early
